title: Phase5 live-run validation
goal: Verify that Phase5 stability improvements (sessions 101-105) are effective under real API execution
scope: Execute one live-run with real APIs
constraints: Do not modify runtime implementation; validation-only execution and reporting
acceptance_criteria: AC-106-01: live-run reached at least implementation stage
AC-106-03: retry behavior matches session-102 design
AC-106-04: patch normalization applied or not_applicable
AC-106-05: structured log exists in artifacts/
